title: Shipping & Delivery
content:
## Shipping & Delivery Policy

### Free Shipping
**Get free shipping on all orders above ₹499!**

We offer fast and reliable delivery across India through trusted logistics partners.

### Delivery Timeline
- **Standard Delivery**: 4-6 business days
- **Express Delivery**: 2-3 business days (Available in select areas)

### Shipping Charges
- **Orders below ₹499**: ₹50 flat rate
- **Orders above ₹499**: Completely FREE

### Tracking Your Order
Once your order is shipped, you'll receive a tracking number via SMS and email. You can track your order in real-time on our website.

### Delivery Zones
We deliver to all major cities and towns across India, including:
- Metro areas (NCR, Mumbai, Bangalore, etc.)
- Tier 1 cities
- Tier 2 cities
- Select tier 3 locations

Note: Some remote areas may have extended delivery times.

### Undelivered Packages
If a package is undelivered due to incorrect address or customer unavailability, we'll contact you for re-delivery or return.

title: Returns & Refunds
content:
## Returns & Refunds Policy

### Easy 15-Day Returns
**Return any product within 15 days of delivery for a full refund!**

We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. If you're not happy, simply return it.

### Return Eligibility
- Product must be unused and in original packaging
- All original labels and tags must be intact
- Product must be in resalable condition
- Return must be initiated within 15 days of delivery

### How to Return
1. Contact our customer support team
2. Get your return authorization number
3. Ship the product back to us (we'll provide address)
4. Refund processed within 7-10 days of receiving your return

### Non-Returnable Items
- Used or opened products
- Items without original packaging
- Products damaged due to misuse
- Items outside the 15-day return window

### Refund Process
- Refunds are processed to the original payment method
- Bank transfers may take 5-10 business days to reflect
- Credit card refunds typically show within 2-3 billing cycles

### Damaged or Defective Products
Received a damaged item? Contact us immediately with photos. We'll replace it for free or issue a full refund.

title: 100% Authenticity Guarantee
content:
## 100% Authenticity Guarantee

### We Guarantee Authentic Products
Every product sold on Sunfara is **100% authentic** and sourced directly from authorized distributors and brand partners.

### Quality Assurance
- All products are tested for quality before dispatch
- We maintain strict vendor verification processes
- Regular audits ensure compliance with standards

### What We Guarantee
✅ Authentic products from verified brands
✅ Expiry dates at least 6 months from purchase
✅ Original packaging and labels
✅ Products in pristine condition
✅ Full refund if authenticity is questioned

### Verification Process
- Every brand partner is thoroughly vetted
- We maintain direct relationships with manufacturers
- Regular stock audits and quality checks
- Customer satisfaction is our priority

### Report Counterfeit
If you suspect a product is counterfeit, please contact us immediately at support@sunfara.com with photos and details. We'll investigate and take appropriate action.

title: Vendor Terms & Policies
content:
## Vendor Terms & Policies

### For Sellers & Vendors
Welcome to Sunfara Marketplace! Here are our terms and policies for vendors.

### Vendor Registration
- Complete vendor verification process
- Valid GST registration (mandatory for businesses)
- PAN card and bank details
- Legal business documentation
- Quality compliance certifications

### Product Guidelines
- All products must be original and authentic
- Proper documentation and certifications required
- Clear product descriptions and accurate pricing
- High-quality product images (minimum 3 images)
- Detailed ingredient/content information

### Commission Structure
- Commission varies by category (10-25%)
- Payment terms: Net 7 days after order completion
- Refund processing fee: 2% of refunded amount

### Performance Metrics
- Minimum 4.0 star rating required
- Order fulfillment rate: Minimum 95%
- Return processing: Within 48 hours
- Customer response time: Within 24 hours

### Prohibited Items
Vendors cannot sell:
- Counterfeit or replica products
- Expired items
- Products without proper certifications
- Restricted or banned items

### Compliance & Quality
- Regular audits and inspections
- Product quality verification
- Customer feedback monitoring
- Violation penalties and suspension policies

### Support
For vendor support, visit vendor.sunfara.com or contact vendorsupport@sunfara.com
